rationale: The diff only adds an execution metadata file and does not modify the required UI or API code, so none of the acceptance criteria for the impact-matrix/proposed-policy implementation can be verified as implemented.

findings.summary: No change was made to extend `IMPACT_MATRIX_OPERATIONS` to include `create` and `update`, so the required five-operation matrix is not implemented.
The policies page was not updated with the required proposed-policy state declarations, reset behavior, or second proposed-policy load/fanout, so AC2-AC4 are not implemented.
There are no changes to the explain/effective policy API surface for optional `policyOverride`, and no evidence of the required typecheck, lint, or E2E verification.
